description: Use this API to change the value of the element of the SWREF array associated with a specified switched shunt. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.0.0. ierr = change_swsref_2(ibus, id, newval)

parameters.name: newval
parameters.description: New value to be assigned to the swsref array entry associated with switched shunt at bus ibus. (input).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - no table mode for switched shunt at this bus. - switched shunt dynamic model at this switched shunt is bypassed.
